title: Kornelios #2883
definition:
Cornelius = "of a horn"

 1) a Roman centurion of the Italian cohort stationed in Caesarea who
    converted to Christianity
nasbUsage:

 1) a Roman centurion of the Italian cohort stationed in Caesarea who
    converted to Christianity
